overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse through the New Austin region. The character travels from open grassland through a wooden ranch settlement with various outbuildings, then back into open range where other riders are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: trotting on horseback through tall grassland toward a distant ranch settlement

entered.detail: cluster of green oak trees scattered across the grassland
worn dirt path cutting through the tall grass
expansive field of dry golden grass under bright sun
boulder sitting in the grass near the path
distant two-story wooden building with red roof

segments.scene_description: The character rides a horse through open grassland with scattered oak trees. The dirt trail winds through tall golden grass toward a distant wooden ranch house visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing approaching main ranch house

events.description: passes under timber archway and onto wooden bridge entering the settlement
horse slows to a walk while crossing the wooden bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing wooden bridge and approaching the main two-story ranch house

entered.detail: large wooden utility arch spanning the entrance to the settlement
weathered wooden plank bridge crossing a dry creek bed
prominent two-story ranch house with wraparound porch and red roof
white painted wooden fence lining the property boundary
wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The horse crosses a wooden bridge beneath a timber archway. A large two-story wooden ranch house with a white picket fence comes into view on the left as the character rides past the main settlement building.

scene_state.functional_zone: ranch settlement with wooden outbuildings and sheds

events.description: leaves the main house behind and enters the working area of the ranch with outbuildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through the ranch settlement past various wooden sheds and outbuildings

entered.detail: small weathered wooden storage shed with sloped roof
large wooden barn structure with double doors
old wooden wagon wheel leaning against a fence

segments.scene_description: Riding through the heart of the settlement, the character passes wooden sheds, a large barn, and abandoned wagon wheels. The main two-story house falls behind as the path winds between various ranch outbuildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between settlement and open range

events.description: other riders on horseback become visible in the far distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along dirt path as buildings thin out and open grassland returns

entered.detail: rolling hills covered in green vegetation on the horizon
small group of figures on horseback visible far down the trail

segments.scene_description: The settlement buildings give way to more open terrain. The path continues through sparse grassland with distant hills visible, and other riders appear far ahead on the trail.

events.description: approaching closer to the group of riders ahead on the trail

agents.ego_description: riding through open range toward a group of distant riders and horses

notable_agents.action: group of riders on horseback moving along the trail ahead

entered.detail: group of three riders on horses standing on the trail ahead
distant small shed or cabin in the field

segments.scene_description: The character rides into open grassland where other riders on horseback become clearly visible ahead on the trail. The settlement is now far behind, with only open range, distant hills, and scattered trees surrounding the dirt path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open golden grassland through a rustic ranch settlement and back into the expansive wilderness. It begins on a winding dirt trail flanked by scattered oak trees, moving steadily toward a distant wooden ranch house on the horizon. As the horse crosses a wooden bridge beneath a timber archway, the scene opens into the heart of the settlement, passing a two-story house with a white picket fence and a series of barns and abandoned wagon wheels. The path then leads away from the outbuildings as the architecture gives way to sparse terrain and distant hills. Finally, the environment expands back into open range, where the settlement fades into the distance and other riders become clearly visible ahead on the trail.
